title: Housekeeping sweep: supersedes reciprocity, langgraph refs, emergence closeouts
description: Bundled S-items, all pre-sanctioned: (1) add reciprocal Supersedes fields to DEC-008 (for DEC-004/007) and DEC-014 (for DEC-012) — the three TASK-197 findings, sanctioned as 'fold into next decisions.md touch'; validate_decisions should drop to 0 conflict notes. (2) improvement-backlog item 'Clean up stale langgraph/ references': fix or annotate remaining langgraph/ directory mentions in active (non-archive, non-artifact) files only — historical artifacts stay untouched. (3) Emergence lifecycle closeouts: IDEA-0016 status update (still CANDIDATE? set owner intent), IDEA-0017 -> PROMOTED_TO_TASK with TASK-199 linked and a lifecycle note (INS-0007's capture-needs-closeout rule).
acceptance_criteria: validate_decisions.py reports 0 conflict notes after the reciprocity edits; validate_shared_state stays 21/21.
Active-file langgraph/ references fixed or annotated; archive/artifacts untouched; backlog item closed with evidence.
IDEA-0017 closed out to PROMOTED_TO_TASK linking TASK-199; IDEA-0016 status reflects real intent; INDEX rebuilt; map_emergence validate+stale clean.
